combined_text: Look Who Switched to Sprint from Verizon: The Guy Who Used To Ask If You Could Hear Me Now Paul Marcarelli Appears in New Advertising to Promote Sprint’s Improved Network Reliability…and He is a Customer, Too Sprint advertising proclaims: Don’t let a 1% difference in network reliability cost you twice as much; leave your expensive old carrier and save 50% on most national carrier rate pla
